rationale.R1.5: The output does not provide a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but could be more explicit.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and is mostly within scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some minor edits are not.
